stories.headline: Ghostbusting in East St. Louis
stories.author_title: Computer-assisted reporting specialist for the St. Louis Post-Dispatch
stories.summary: George Landau and Tim Novak investigated voter fraud in East St. Louis using computer-assisted methods, uncovering hundreds of names of deceased or fictitious voters registered to vote.

stories.headline: PLUGGING IN: THE HARTFORD CONNECTION
stories.summary: The article provides eight practical tips for journalists introducing computer-assisted reporting to newsrooms, including learning technical language, understanding hardware/software needs, educating editors and colleagues, securing funding, and working collaboratively.
